_meta.description: Ingredient macro library. All values per 100g of raw/edible portion unless noted. Scale by (grams / 100) for any portion.

ingredients.name: Egg, whole, raw
ingredients.notes: Medium egg ~44g (~63 kcal). Complete protein, all essential amino acids. Yolk carries the fat/choline.

ingredients.name: Banana, raw
ingredients.notes: Medium banana ~118g (~105 kcal). Riper = slightly more available sugar.

ingredients.name: Extra virgin olive oil
ingredients.notes: 1 tbsp ~13.5g (~119 kcal). Pure fat; calorie-dense, easy to under-count by eye.

ingredients.name: Sweet potato, raw
ingredients.notes: Weight raw. Roasting concentrates by water loss but macros per portion stay the same.

ingredients.name: Red bell pepper, raw
ingredients.notes: Medium pepper ~120g. High vitamin C.

ingredients.name: Onion, raw
ingredients.notes: Yellow/brown onion. Sweet onion slightly lower kcal (~32).

ingredients.name: Kvarg, natural 0.3% fat (Eldorado)
ingredients.notes: From label. 500g tub. Complete protein (dairy). Carbs are all natural lactose sugar. Your main protein lever in this batch.

ingredients.name: Cherry tomato sauce (Mutti)
ingredients.notes: From label; fiber not declared (canned tomato ~0.9g/100g if you want to estimate). Sat fat <0.1g, salt 0.01g.

ingredients.name: Tomato passata (Mutti)
ingredients.notes: From label; 99.5% tomato + salt (0.50g/100g). Fiber not declared (~1g/100g if estimating). 500g carton.

ingredients.name: Potato, baking, raw (flesh + skin)
ingredients.notes: USDA flesh+skin. Weight raw. Russet/baking type. Skin adds the fiber, so bake with skin on.

ingredients.name: Chia seeds (Garant, organic)
ingredients.notes: From label. Carbs shown are NET (1.3g) with fiber (35g) listed separately, EU-style. Omega-3 ALA 23g/100g. Sat fat 3.9g. High calcium/magnesium. Label suggests max 15g/day (~1.5 tbsp).

ingredients.name: Dark chocolate 70% (Fazer)
ingredients.notes: From label. 70% cocoa, baking/cooking choc. Sat fat 27g, sugars 30g. Fiber not declared (~8-11g/100g typical for 70%). 100g bar. Calorie-dense topping — weigh it.

ingredients.name: Rolled oats (Garant, organic)
ingredients.notes: From label. 100% wholegrain. 1 dl ≈ 40g dry. Lysine-limited protein — pairs well with your kvarg/eggs to complete it.

ingredients.name: Whey protein, Belgian chocolate (Body Science Whey 100%)
ingredients.notes: From label. Scoop ~31g (=~115 kcal, ~22g protein). Sat fat 4.4g, sugars 3.4g. Complete protein. 1000g bag, ~32 servings.

ingredients.name: Powdered peanut butter / PB2 (Tru-Nut)
ingredients.notes: From label. Defatted peanut powder (92% peanuts + sugar + salt). Fiber not declared (~8-10g/100g typical). Salt 1.38g. Big protein-per-calorie win vs regular PB.

ingredients.name: Whey protein, strawberry (Pureness)
ingredients.notes: From label. Scoop ~26g (=~93 kcal, ~19g protein). Sat fat 3.2g, sugars 0g (stevia-sweetened). Complete protein, full amino profile printed on pack.

ingredients.name: Egg whites, liquid pasteurized (Dava Äggvita)
ingredients.notes: From label. 1 dl ≈ 3 egg whites. Pure protein, zero fat/carb. Complete protein but no yolk nutrients. Use within 28 days of opening.

ingredients.name: Cherries, frozen pitted (Garant)
ingredients.notes: From label. Whole pitted, origin Chile. All carbs are sugar (15g). Label warns occasional pits may remain. Frozen weight = thawed weight.

ingredients.name: Chicken thigh fillet, raw (Guldfågeln)
ingredients.notes: From label. Raw weight; ~870g pack. Higher fat than breast = juicier, more forgiving to cook. Complete protein. Loses ~25% weight cooked.

ingredients.name: Chicken breast fillet, raw (Garant)
ingredients.notes: From label. Raw weight; ~921g pack. Leanest big-protein source here (23g/100g). Complete protein. Loses ~25% weight cooked (so ~155g raw → ~115g cooked).

ingredients.name: Butter, salted
ingredients.notes: USDA standard salted butter. Sat fat ~51g. Calorie-dense; small amounts only.

ingredients.name: Red/purple onion, raw
ingredients.notes: Macros essentially identical to yellow onion; red has more anthocyanins/quercetin (antioxidants), milder/sweeter flavour. Fiber 1.7g/100g.
